name: Memory Pro System
description: Enhanced AI memory — vector store, document-level MSA, KG, collision engine, executable skills, and closed-loop skill evolution.

memoryServerPort.description: Port the memory server listens on.

workspacePath.description: Path to the memory-pro workspace. Leave empty to auto-detect from OpenClaw workspace.

autoStart.description: Automatically start the memory server when the gateway loads.

contextInjection.description: Inject recalled memory into agent prompts via before_prompt_build hook.

contextMaxTokens.description: Max tokens for memory context injected into prompts.
